name: escapement
description: Host-neutral agentic workflow layer: beads issue tracking, oracle-discipline gates, TDD enforcement, and outcome-bias continuation for Codex sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic workflow gates: oracle discipline, TDD enforcement, beads tracking
interface.longDescription: Escapement is a host-neutral workflow layer for agentic coding sessions. Oracle-discipline gates block implementation-echo tests and oracle downgrades. TDD enforcement requires a Test Oracle Brief before writing code. Beads provides durable issue tracking. Works alongside your existing workflow.
defaultPrompt: Show me what work is ready in this repo.
Check if I have a Test Oracle Brief before writing code.
What Escapement gates are active in this session?
